patterns.description: 沒有花牌
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand contains no flower tiles.

patterns.description: 花牌數字同坐位相同
patterns.descriptionEn: Flower tile number matches player's seat wind.

patterns.description: 花牌數字同坐位不同
patterns.descriptionEn: Flower tile number does not match player's seat wind.

patterns.description: 四隻同系列的花
patterns.descriptionEn: All four flowers from one of the two flower sets.

patterns.description: 二台花可以立刻食胡, 不須要計手上的牌
patterns.descriptionEn: Drawing both sets of flowers is an instant win regardless of hand.

patterns.description: 正風牌刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplet of one's own seat / prevailing wind.

patterns.nameZh: 碰出東、南、西或北(不是正風)
patterns.description: 非正風牌刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplet of a wind that is not the seat / prevailing wind.

patterns.description: 中、發或白刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplet of red, green or white dragon.

patterns.description: 聲明已經叫胡，不得轉章，不得暗槓，可以睇其他家的牌
patterns.descriptionEn: Player announces ready hand; may view others' discards but cannot change tiles or conceal-kong.

patterns.description: 胡出時(不計莊前)只得一番
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand that scores only one tai (excluding dealer-continue); pays out at the chicken-hand rate.

patterns.description: 叫胡叫對碰
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning on a shanpon / dual-pair wait.

patterns.description: 可以砌到叫單釣或叫偏章
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand could also be arranged as a single-tile or edge wait.

patterns.description: 單釣或叫偏章
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning on a single-tile (pair) wait or an edge wait.

patterns.description: 沒有刻子, 全部順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand consists entirely of sequences with no triplets.

patterns.description: 以一對二、五或八做眼
patterns.descriptionEn: Using a pair of 2s, 5s or 8s as the eyes.

patterns.description: 同門一,二,三加七,八,九 或 一,一,一加九,九,九 (有同門牌亦可)
patterns.descriptionEn: In one suit: 1-2-3 plus 7-8-9, or 1-1-1 plus 9-9-9.

patterns.description: 沒有番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand contains no honor tiles.

patterns.description: 沒有番子及沒有花
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand contains no honor tiles and no flowers.

patterns.description: 沒有番子，沒有花，又是平胡
patterns.descriptionEn: No honors, no flowers, and all chows (pure sequence hand).

patterns.description: 門前清, 暗槓亦可
patterns.descriptionEn: No exposed melds; concealed kongs allowed.

patterns.nameEn: Last Tile Self-Draw (Moon from Sea Bottom)
patterns.description: 最後一隻牌自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning by self-drawing the very last tile in the wall.

patterns.description: 自己摸食出
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning tile is drawn by the winner themselves.

patterns.description: 門前清自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning by self-draw while fully concealed.

patterns.description: 自己摸到三張相同牌，碰出第四張
patterns.descriptionEn: Three tiles in hand plus claiming the fourth to form an exposed kong.

patterns.description: 自己摸到四張相同牌
patterns.descriptionEn: All four identical tiles drawn by the player forming a concealed kong.

patterns.description: 摸花時自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Self-drawing the winning tile as a flower-replacement tile.

patterns.description: 開摃時自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Self-drawing the winning tile as a kong-replacement tile.

patterns.description: 搶摃不當自摸，搶摃只當是被搶那家出沖，不過加一番
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning by robbing the tile another player adds to a pung to form an exposed kong; counts as discard-win plus one tai.

patterns.description: 開槓後再開槓時自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Self-draw win on a kong-replacement tile immediately after another kong.

patterns.description: 也是不當自摸，當摃上摃的那家出沖
patterns.descriptionEn: Robbing the tile used for a consecutive kong; treated as discard-win from the kong-maker.

patterns.description: 刻子就是三隻一樣的牌。明摃、暗摃或在自己手上三隻一樣的牌叫做暗刻
patterns.descriptionEn: Two concealed triplets in hand (exposed/concealed kongs also count).

patterns.description: 三個刻子在自己手裡
patterns.descriptionEn: Three concealed triplets in hand.

patterns.description: 四個刻子在自己手裡
patterns.descriptionEn: Four concealed triplets in hand.

patterns.description: 兩個一樣的順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Two identical sequences in the same suit.

patterns.description: 三個一樣的順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Three identical sequences in the same suit.

patterns.description: 四個一樣的順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Four identical sequences in the same suit.

patterns.description: 二個款式不同的但數字一樣順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Two sequences of the same numbers in two different suits.

patterns.description: 三個款式不同的但數字一樣順子
patterns.descriptionEn: Three sequences of the same numbers in three different suits.

patterns.description: 四個數字一樣順子，不論款式，不再計三相逢/一般高/兩般高/三般高
patterns.descriptionEn: Four chows of the same numbers (any suits); excludes other identical-chow bonuses.

patterns.description: 五個數字一樣順子，不論款式，不再計三相逢/一般高/兩般高/三般高
patterns.descriptionEn: Five chows of the same numbers (any suits); excludes other identical-chow bonuses.

patterns.description: 兩款數字一樣的刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Two triplets of the same number in different suits.

patterns.description: 二兄弟再加上另一個兄弟做眼
patterns.descriptionEn: Two same-number triplets plus the third same-number pair as eyes.

patterns.description: 三款數字一樣的刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Three triplets of the same number in all three suits.

patterns.description: 兩副同款而數子相連樣的刻子，另加一對數子相連的眼
patterns.descriptionEn: Two consecutive-number triplets in one suit plus a consecutive-number pair as eyes.

patterns.description: 三副同款而數子相連樣的刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Three triplets of consecutive numbers in the same suit.

patterns.description: 用盡同一隻牌的四隻牌
patterns.descriptionEn: All four copies of one tile used within the hand.

patterns.description: 用盡同一隻牌的四隻牌, 兩隻做眼
patterns.descriptionEn: All four copies of one tile used, with two as the eyes.

patterns.description: 用盡同一隻牌的四隻牌（順子）
patterns.descriptionEn: All four copies of one tile used across sequences.

patterns.description: 同一個款式，只有一至九，其中有些是上回來的
patterns.descriptionEn: 1-to-9 straight in one suit with some tiles claimed from discards.

patterns.description: 同一個款式，只有一至九，全部是是手裡的，食胡那隻可以是其他家打出
patterns.descriptionEn: 1-to-9 straight in one suit entirely concealed (winning tile from discard allowed).

patterns.description: 同一個款式，只有一至九，其中有些是上回來的
patterns.descriptionEn: 1-9 straight across mixed suits with some tiles from discards.

patterns.description: 同一個款式，只有一至九，全部是是手裡的，食胡那隻可以是其他家打出
patterns.descriptionEn: 1-9 straight across mixed suits entirely concealed (winning tile from discard allowed).

patterns.description: 東南西北為一門，中發白為一門，筒索萬各三門。全副牌五門都有齊
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand contains tiles from all five categories: winds, dragons, dots, bamboos, characters.

patterns.description: 不計番子而缺少筒、索或萬一門
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand has no tiles from one of the three suits (honors ignored).

patterns.description: 只有一門牌及番子
patterns.descriptionEn: One suit plus honors only.

patterns.description: 只有一門牌及沒有番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Only one suit with no honor tiles.

patterns.description: 全副牌是刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Entire hand is made of triplets.

patterns.description: 全副牌落地，單釣而其他家打出胡牌(明槓亦可，暗槓不可)
patterns.descriptionEn: All sets exposed, single-pair wait, win on another player's discard (exposed kong allowed; concealed kong not).

patterns.description: 全副牌落地，單釣而自摸(明槓亦可，暗槓不可)
patterns.descriptionEn: All sets exposed, single-pair wait, win by self-draw (exposed kong allowed; concealed kong not).

patterns.description: 拿走食胡牌後，地下只有七隻牌內食胡(算至第七隻)，不計上及碰了的牌
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning within first seven drawn tiles (not counting claimed tiles), excluding the winning tile.

patterns.description: 拿走食胡牌後，地下只有十隻牌內食胡(算至第十隻)，不計上及碰了的牌
patterns.descriptionEn: Winning within first ten drawn tiles (not counting claimed tiles), excluding the winning tile.

patterns.description: 中、發、白其中兩組刻子及一對子
patterns.descriptionEn: Two dragon triplets plus the third dragon as eyes.

patterns.description: 中、發、白三組刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplets of all three dragons.

patterns.description: 有東、南、西、北其中兩組刻子及一對做眼
patterns.descriptionEn: Two wind triplets plus a wind pair as eyes.

patterns.description: 有東、南、西、北其中三組刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplets of three different winds.

patterns.description: 有東、南、西、北其中三組刻子及一對做眼
patterns.descriptionEn: Three wind triplets plus the fourth wind as eyes.

patterns.description: 有東、南、西、北四組刻子
patterns.descriptionEn: Triplets of all four winds.

patterns.description: 十三么，另三隻是自己摸回來的順子或暗刻，不能上或碰回來
patterns.descriptionEn: Standard thirteen-terminal-and-honor hand plus a concealed sequence or triplet (no claimed tiles).

patterns.description: 東南西北中發白，其他三門每樣三隻，但不能搭上，例如一、四、九或二、五、九，再加一對眼
patterns.descriptionEn: All seven honors plus three non-adjacent tiles in each of the three suits, plus a pair.

patterns.description: 五個刻子在自己手裡
patterns.descriptionEn: Five concealed triplets in hand.

patterns.description: 自摸門前對對糊
patterns.descriptionEn: Concealed all-pungs won by self-draw.

patterns.description: 八對子，三隻一樣的不能碰出
patterns.descriptionEn: Eight pairs; triplets cannot be claimed for pung.

patterns.description: 全副牌沒有么九及番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand contains no terminals (1s/9s) or honor tiles.

patterns.description: 全副牌每一組合都有么九或番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Every set (and the eyes) contains a terminal or honor tile.

patterns.description: 全副牌每一組合都有么九, 無番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Every set contains a terminal; no honor tiles used.

patterns.description: 全副牌都是么九及番子
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand is entirely terminals and honors.

patterns.description: 全副牌都是么九
patterns.descriptionEn: Hand is entirely terminals (no honors).

patterns.description: 莊家一開牌補花後即吃糊 (開牌開槓後吃糊唔計天糊)
patterns.descriptionEn: Dealer wins immediately after initial deal and flower replacement (subsequent kong replacements do not count).

patterns.description: 閒家第一次摸牌即自摸
patterns.descriptionEn: Non-dealer self-draws a winning tile on their first turn.

patterns.description: 不是莊家獨有的牌類，閒家在四隻牌內吃糊
patterns.descriptionEn: Non-dealer wins within the first four tiles drawn (not a dealer-only hand).

patterns.description: 四家打同一隻牌，第一家俾其他三家每人一個底
patterns.descriptionEn: When all four players discard the same tile, the first discarder pays one base to each other player (instant pay).

patterns.description: 暗摃在完結時須打開讓其他家知道，否則訓二個底
patterns.descriptionEn: Concealed kong must be revealed at game end; otherwise owner pays two bases (instant pay).

patterns.description: 拿到一台草時，其他三家每人俾半個底，可以再拿
patterns.descriptionEn: Collecting one full set of wind flowers: each other player pays half a base (may continue drawing).

patterns.description: 拿到一台花時，其他三家每人俾一個底，拿了花不能再拿草
patterns.descriptionEn: Collecting one full set of flowers: each other player pays one base (cannot then also collect grass).

patterns.description: 做莊擲骰，擲到一二三，俾其他三家每人一個底
patterns.descriptionEn: Four flowers numbered 1-2-3-4 across both flower and grass sets (user-confirmed; page description about dice rolls may be a source-data conflict to revisit).

patterns.description: 做莊擲骰，擲到圍骰，其他三家每人俾莊家一個底
patterns.descriptionEn: Dealer rolls three-of-a-kind: collects one base from each other player.
Penalty for falsely claiming a win.

patterns.description: 食糊的人收取
patterns.descriptionEn: Penalty for calling pung but not completing it; winner collects one base.
